sections.title: Introduction
body: This Cookies Policy explains how Pilot Mobility Private Limited ("Pilot Mobility", "Pilot", "we", "our", or "us") uses cookies and similar technologies on the Pilotnow website (www.pilotnow.in).
By continuing to browse or use our website, you agree to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.

sections.title: 1) What Are Cookies?
body: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, smartphone, or tablet) when you visit a website. They help websites function efficiently, improve user experience, and provide information to the website owner.
Cookies do not typically contain personally identifiable information, but they may be linked to personal data that you provide to us.

sections.title: 2) How Pilot Mobility Uses Cookies
body: Ensure proper functioning of the website.
Improve website performance and user experience.
Analyze website traffic and visitor behavior.
Enhance security and prevent fraudulent activity.
Support marketing and promotional activities (where applicable).

sections.title: 3) Types of Cookies We Use
body: Pilot Mobility uses different types of cookies to enhance user experience and website performance.

sections.title: a) Essential Cookies
body: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core features such as page navigation, secure access, and form submissions.
Without these cookies, certain parts of the website may not work correctly.

sections.title: b) Performance & Analytics Cookies
body: These cookies collect information about how visitors use our website, such as:
This information helps us improve website functionality and user experience.

sections.title: c) Functional Cookies
body: These cookies remember your preferences, such as:

sections.title: d) Marketing & Third-Party Cookies
body: Where applicable, we may use third-party services (such as analytics or social media integrations) that place cookies on your device.
Pilot Mobility does not control third-party cookies and recommends reviewing the privacy policies of such third-party providers.

sections.title: 4) Third-Party Services
body: Our website may use third-party tools such as:
Social media plugins (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn).
These services may use cookies to collect data in accordance with their own privacy policies.

sections.title: 5) Managing Cookies
body: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings.
Most web browsers allow you to:
Please note: Disabling certain cookies may impact the functionality and performance of the website.

sections.title: 6) Data Protection
body: Any personal data collected through cookies is handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws.
We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your data.

The revised version will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
